title: space_invite_set: no check caller is a member of the target space
description: create_space_invite(id, code, space_id, account_id) stores the invite without verifying account_id is a member or admin of space_id. Trigger: any authenticated user sends SpaceInvite/set with an arbitrary spaceId. Bad behavior: the invite is stored; when a victim uses the code via Space/join, use_space_invite_code() looks up the space_id and calls upsert_space_member_with_role() — adding them to a space the attacker does not control. This is an authorization bypass: anyone can grant anyone else membership in any space.
close_reason: Fixed: get_space_member_role() check added before create_space_invite(); non-members get forbidden error; test added
